title: Senior Revenue Manager at Hyatt India

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Hyatt India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Hyatt India in Meerut is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hyatt India:
Hyatt India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hyatt India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
